columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: APPROVED_DATE
columns.Comments: Approved date of the requisition

columns.Name: INT_FIRST_POSTED_DATE
columns.Comments: First Internal Posted Date of Requisition

columns.Name: FILLED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date at which Job Requisition is Filled

columns.Name: SUSPENDED_DURATION
columns.Comments: Suspended duration of the requisition in seconds

columns.Name: EXT_FIRST_POSTED_DATE
columns.Comments: First External Posted Date of Requisition

columns.Name: REQ_SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the source type of the Requisition.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Object as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OBJECT_STATUS.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique readable number for the Requistion.

columns.Name: REQ_USAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Whether this instance is an actual Requisition or a Requisition Template. Stores the Requisition usage type as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REQUISITION_USAGE.

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of Recruiting as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_RECRUITING_TYPE. This colums accept NULL values.

columns.Name: CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PHASES_B table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to process table IRC_PROCESS_B : store the PROCESS_ID use to track the lifecycle of this Requisition.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to process table IRC_PROCESS_B : store the initial PROCESS_ID from which the proper PROCESS_ID of this requisition is an instance.

columns.Name: HIRING_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the hiring manager for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the hiring manager's assignment for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the recruiter's assignment for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the template associated to the requisition. Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: MANAGER_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Stores the manager level as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is MANAGER_LEVEL.

columns.Name: FULL_PART_TIME
columns.Comments: Stores whether the opening is for a full or part time job, as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is FULL_PART_TIME.

columns.Name: WORKER_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the worker type as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is PER_PERIOD_TYPE.

columns.Name: WORK_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Work start date of the job.

columns.Name: WORK_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Work end date of the job.

columns.Name: JOB_SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the job shift for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_JOB_SHIFT.

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the job type for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_JOB_TYPE.

columns.Name: STUDY_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the study level for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is HRT_EDUCATION_LEVEL.

columns.Name: INT_EMPLOYER_DESC_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the internal employer description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: EXT_EMPLOYER_DESC_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the external employer description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: INT_ORGANIZATION_DESC_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the internal organization description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: EXT_ORGANIZATION_DESC_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the external organization description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_JOBS_F table.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_JOB_FAMILY_F

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the job function code for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is JOB_FUNCTION_CODE.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES table.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the primary work location of the requisition. Foreign key to PER_LOCATIONS.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: LEGAL_EMPLOYER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_GRADES_F table.

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: JUSTIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Justification for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REQ_JUSTIFICATION.

columns.Name: REGULAR_TEMPORARY
columns.Comments: Stores whether the opening is for a regular or temporary job, as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is REGULAR_TEMPORARY.

columns.Name: NUMBER_TO_HIRE
columns.Comments: Stores the number of people to hire for this Requisition.

columns.Name: UNLIMITED_HIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this Requisition can hire unlimited number of people.

columns.Name: HOT_JOB_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this Requisition should be considerate as a Hot Job or not

columns.Name: WORKPLACE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Workplace type value for this Requisition, as a lookup code.The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_WORKPLACE_TYPE.

columns.Name: EXT_CONTACT_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the External Contact name

columns.Name: EXT_CONTACT_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Stores the External Contact email

columns.Name: INT_CONTACT_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the Internal contact name

columns.Name: INT_CONTACT_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Stores the Internal contact email

columns.Name: INT_PUBLISH_JOB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the Internal published job status

columns.Name: INT_PUBLISH_JOB_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Internal published job start date.

columns.Name: INT_PUBLISH_JOB_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Internal published job end date.

columns.Name: EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the external published job status

columns.Name: EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_START_DATE
columns.Comments: External published job start date

columns.Name: EXT_PUBLISH_JOB_END_DATE
columns.Comments: External published job end date

columns.Name: BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the currency code for the budget for this Requisition. Foreign key to FND_CURRENCIES table.

columns.Name: SOURCING_BUDGET
columns.Comments: Stores the sourcing budget for this Requisition.

columns.Name: TRAVEL_BUDGET
columns.Comments: Stores the travel budget for this Requisition.

columns.Name: RELOCATION_BUDGET
columns.Comments: Stores the relocation budget allocated for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_REFERRAL_BONUS
columns.Comments: Stores the amount for employee referral bonus.

columns.Name: MIN_SALARY
columns.Comments: Stores the minimum salary for this Requisition.

columns.Name: MAX_SALARY
columns.Comments: Stores the maximum salary for this Requisition.

columns.Name: SALARY_FREQUENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the salary frequency as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is CMP_SALARY_BASIS.

columns.Name: SALARY_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the salary currency information. Foreign key to FND_CURRENCIES table.

columns.Name: SALARY_PERIOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the salary period as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_SALARY_PERIOD. This colums accept NULL values.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the corresponding job profile ID. Foreign key to HRT_PROFILES_B table.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_IN_ORG_CHART_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the requisition should appear in the Org Chart or not.

columns.Name: SYNC_JOB_VALUES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store the boolean to indicate if, for a particular template, the values from "Job" object should always be synched with template

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores comments about this requisition.

columns.Name: REQ_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last modified date of the Requisition. It should be considered the equivalent of last update.

columns.Name: HIRED_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the number of candidates hired on this Requisition.

columns.Name: SUBS_PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the process template that submissions on this requisition will follow.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_APPLY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Apply Flow used for external candidates applying on this requisition. Foreign key to IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_B table.

columns.Name: PIPELINE_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the pipeline requisition the hiring requisition was created from Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B

columns.Name: PIPELINE_REQUISITION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the requisition is a pipeline requisition

columns.Name: APPLY_WHEN_NOT_POSTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the candidate can apply on a requisition when not posted.

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the corresponding position ID. Foreign key to HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F table.

columns.Name: AUTOMATIC_FILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the requisition can be auto-filled.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DESCRIPTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the external description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the internal description of the Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: REQ_USAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Whether this instance is an actual Stand Alone, Job Based or Position Based requisition template. Stores the Requisition usage type as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REQUISITION_USAGE_TYPE.

columns.Name: OPEN_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date at which the job requisition was changed to Open phase.

columns.Name: AUTO_OPEN_REQUISITION
columns.Comments: Stores whether the requisition can be auto posted.

columns.Name: AUTO_UNPOST_REQUISITION
columns.Comments: Stores whether the requisition can be auto unposted.  The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REQ_AUTO_UNPOST.

columns.Name: POSTING_EXPIRE_IN_DAYS
columns.Comments: Stores the number of days after which the postings must expire.

columns.Name: UNPOST_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: References the formula used to unpost the requisition.

columns.Name: TN_AGENCY_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Talent Network Agency Status code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_AGENCY_REQUISITION_STATUS. This column accepts NULL values.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
